role: This directory contains comprehensive test suites for ArchSpine's core infrastructure, CLI, synchronization, error handling, security, and governance modules.
responsibility: The tests in this directory verify the correctness, robustness, and security of ArchSpine's build scripts, agent instructions synchronization, demo governance lifecycle, error system convergence, structural/semantic footprint calculations, manifest persistence, distributed lock worker, CLI security commands, sync service pipeline, and spine gate protected output mutation detection. They use isolated temporary directories, mock clients, and multi-process scenarios to ensure reliability.

children.role: Unit test suite for the agent-instructions synchronization utility module.
Unit test suite for the build script's dist packaging exclusion filter
Integration test suite validating the demo project's governance lifecycle using the built CLI and core services.
Integration test suite for error system convergence across core services and MCP infrastructure.
Unit test suite for the structural and semantic footprint calculation utilities in the ArchSpine infrastructure layer.
Vitest test suite covering Manifest persistence and SpineDB batch commit integration.
Vitest integration test suite for the distributed lock worker (lock-worker.mjs), validating cross-process acquire, release, and payload rewrite semantics.
Integration test suite for the ArchSpine CLI, specifically testing security-related commands (likely 'sec') using mocked prompts and temporary directories.
Integration test suite for the SyncService synchronization pipeline and Manifest infrastructure.
Vitest test suite for the Spine Gate infrastructure module, verifying protected output mutation detection and baseline writing integrity.
